name: Get Xiaohongshu note comments with JustOneAPI

parameters.content:
## Get Xiaohongshu note comments with JustOneAPI

### How it works

1. The workflow is triggered manually.
2. It prepares API and comment inputs for the request.
3. It fetches Xiaohongshu note comments via HTTP GET request.
4. It outputs the raw comment response and builds a comment list.
5. It outputs the final comment list.

### Setup steps

- - [ ] Configure the Manual Execution Trigger node to start the workflow.
- [ ] Set the required fields in the Prepare API and Comment Inputs node for the API request.
- [ ] Ensure the HTTP request node Fetch Xiaohongshu Note Comments has the correct endpoint URL and parameters.

### Customization

You can customize the API endpoint URL and parameters in the Prepare API and Comment Inputs node to fetch comments from different Xiaohongshu notes.

## Workflow Trigger

Manually triggers the workflow to start execution.

## Prepare API Request

Sets up the necessary inputs and configurations for the API request to fetch Xiaohongshu note comments.

## Fetch Comments

Makes an HTTP GET request to the Xiaohongshu API to retrieve note comments.

## Output Raw Response

Outputs the raw response received from the Xiaohongshu API for debugging or further processing.

## Build Comment List

Processes the raw response to build a structured list of comments using custom code.

## Output Final Comment List

Outputs the final structured list of comments after processing.
